languages.text: "Блюстители ожидают вашего распоряжения". {n}Лязг металла в тоне Иокасты красноречиво свидетельствует о ее готовности к бою.{/n} "Отдайте приказ, и все смутьяны будут немедленно усмирены".

traits.locale_text: "Блюстители ожидают вашего распоряжения". {n}Лязг металла в тоне Иокасты красноречиво свидетельствует о её готовности к бою.{/n} "Отдайте приказ, и все смутьяны будут немедленно усмирены".

languages.text: "The enforcers await your orders." {n}The ring of steel in Jocasta Sauerback's tone eloquently signals her readiness for battle.{/n} "Give the order, and all those troublemakers will be immediately subdued."
languages.original_text: "Блюстители ожидают вашего распоряжения". {n}Лязг металла в тоне Иокасты красноречиво свидетельствует о ее готовности к бою.{/n} "Отдайте приказ, и все смутьяны будут немедленно усмирены".

traits.locale_text: "The enforcers await your orders." {n}The ring of steel in Jocasta Sauerback's tone eloquently signals her readiness for battle.{/n} "Give the order, and all those troublemakers will be immediately subdued."

"The enforcers await your orders." {n}The ring of steel in Jocasta Sauerback's tone eloquently signals her readiness for battle.{/n} "Give the order, and all those troublemakers will be immediately subdued."

"The enforcers await your orders." {n}The ring of steel in Jocasta Sauerback's tone eloquently signals her readiness for battle.{/n} "Give the order, and all those troublemakers will be immediately subdued."

languages.text: 「エンフォーサーたちはあなたの命令を待っています」{n}ジョカスタ・ザウアーバックの口調は鋼鉄のように硬く、彼女の戦闘意欲を物語る.{/n}「命令すれば、あの騒ぎ屋たちはすぐに鎮圧されるだろう」
languages.original_text: "The enforcers await your orders." {n}The ring of steel in Jocasta Sauerback's tone eloquently signals her readiness for battle.{/n} "Give the order, and all those troublemakers will be immediately subdued."

languages.text: "İnfazcılar emirlerinizi bekliyor." {n}Jocasta Sauerback'in ses tonundaki çelik tınısı, savaşa hazır olduğunu ifade ediyor.{/n} "Emri verin, tüm o bozguncular derhâl bastırılsın."
languages.original_text: "The enforcers await your orders." {n}The ring of steel in Jocasta Sauerback's tone eloquently signals her readiness for battle.{/n} "Give the order, and all those troublemakers will be immediately subdued."

traits.locale_text: "İnfazcılar emirlerinizi bekliyor." {n}Jocasta Sauerback'in ses tonundaki çelik tınısı, savaşa hazır olduğunu ifade ediyor.{/n} "Emri verin, tüm o bozguncular derhâl bastırılsın."

languages.text: “执法者正在待命。”{n}约卡斯塔·苏尔贝克的声音仿佛钢铁碰撞般凛冽，她显然已进入了战备状态。{/n}“只需您一声令下，所有寻衅滋事者将被立刻肃清。”
languages.original_text: "The enforcers await your orders." {n}The ring of steel in Jocasta Sauerback's tone eloquently signals her readiness for battle.{/n} "Give the order, and all those troublemakers will be immediately subdued."

traits.locale_text: “执法者正在待命。”{n}约卡斯塔·苏尔贝克的声音仿佛钢铁碰撞般凛冽，她显然已进入了战备状态。{/n}“只需您一声令下，所有寻衅滋事者将被立刻肃清。”

languages.text: "Die Enforcer erwarten Eure Befehle." {n}Der stählerne Unterton in Jocasta Sauerbacks Stimme signalisiert eloquent ihre Kampfbereitschaft.{/n} "Erteilt den Befehl und wir kümmern uns um diese diese Unruhestifter."
languages.original_text: "The enforcers await your orders." {n}The ring of steel in Jocasta Sauerback's tone eloquently signals her readiness for battle.{/n} "Give the order, and all those troublemakers will be immediately subdued."

traits.locale_text: "Die Enforcer erwarten Eure Befehle." {n}Der stählerne Unterton in Jocasta Sauerbacks Stimme signalisiert eloquent ihre Kampfbereitschaft.{/n} "Erteilt den Befehl und wir kümmern uns um diese diese Unruhestifter."

languages.text: « Les prévôts attendent vos instructions. Un mot de votre part, et nous materons ces agitateurs en moins de temps qu'il n'en faut pour le dire. » {n}Le tranchant métallique qui transparaît dans la voix de Jocasta Sauerback trahit sa volonté d'en découdre.{/n}
languages.original_text: "The enforcers await your orders." {n}The ring of steel in Jocasta Sauerback's tone eloquently signals her readiness for battle.{/n} "Give the order, and all those troublemakers will be immediately subdued."

traits.locale_text: « Les prévôts attendent vos instructions. Un mot de votre part, et nous materons ces agitateurs en moins de temps qu'il n'en faut pour le dire. » {n}Le tranchant métallique qui transparaît dans la voix de Jocasta Sauerback trahit sa volonté d'en découdre.{/n}

languages.text: «El personal de seguridad espera órdenes». {n}Por el acero de la voz de Jocasta Sauerback, está lista para entrar en acción.{/n} «Denos la orden y someteremos al momento a esos alborotadores».
languages.original_text: "The enforcers await your orders." {n}The ring of steel in Jocasta Sauerback's tone eloquently signals her readiness for battle.{/n} "Give the order, and all those troublemakers will be immediately subdued."
